name: Bash Guard
description: Blocks dangerous shell commands (rm -rf, force pushes, etc.) before they run.
author: jchen

name: Auto Formatter
description: Runs Prettier or Black on any file Claude just edited or wrote.
author: mrivera

name: Desktop Pinger
description: Sends a native desktop notification whenever Claude needs your attention.
author: sgupta

name: Prompt Logger
description: Appends every user prompt to a local JSONL audit log for later review.
author: kowen

name: Test Runner on Stop
description: Automatically runs the project's test suite whenever Claude finishes responding.
author: dpatel

name: Subagent Summary
description: Collects a short summary line every time a subagent finishes its task.
author: lnguyen

name: Context Snapshot
description: Saves a snapshot of open files and git status right before context compaction.
author: abaker

name: Session Greeter
description: Prints a project-specific welcome banner with recent branch activity at session start.
author: twilson
